story: After the Library on the Moon revealed that enemy ships were closing on Earth, the United World States poured resources into orbital defenses. At Selene, Commander Imani scheduled a full-power test of a new shield ring guarding cislunar traffic. Late that night, engineer Pavel found hairline fractures in two superconducting coils and decided to recheck his data before filing a report. By morning, diplomats were arriving, cargo lanes had been cleared for the demonstration, and the base expected the test to show humanity was finally ready.
implausible_knowledge: Late that night, engineer Pavel found hairline fractures in two superconducting coils and decided to recheck his data before filing a report.
question: When the demonstration window opens, what will Commander Imani most likely do with the shield test?
answer_with_knowledge: Postpone the demonstration and order an inspection of the damaged coils.
answer_without_knowledge: Proceed with the full-power shield demonstration as scheduled.
